zh.Naundorf, Sachsen, Germany: 德國薩辛可萊斯 德利其瑙多福
zh.Naundorf, Naundorf bei Freiberg, Dresden: 德國薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福
德國薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Siegfried von Schoenfeld於大約1270年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福時，他的父親Siegfried von Schoenfeld32歲，母親Brigitta24歲。他於大約1298年與Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg在德國薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Naundorf, Sachsen, Germany: 德国薩辛可萊斯 德利其瑙多福
zh-hans.Naundorf, Naundorf bei Freiberg, Dresden: 德国薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福
德国薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Siegfried von Schoenfeld于大约1270年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福时，他的父亲Siegfried von Schoenfeld32岁，母亲Brigitta24岁。他于大约1298年与Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg在德国薩辛可萊斯 福波格瑙多福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schoenfeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Erwin, Franz, Klaus, Adelheid, Eugen, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard, Hanns.
German (Schönfeld): habitational name from any of numerous places called Schönfeld, from Middle High German schoen ‘beautiful’ + velt ‘open country, field’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Schönfeld): artificial name composed of German schön ‘beautiful’ + Feld ‘field’. Compare Schonfeld .

variants.name: Schonfeld
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chaim, Yoel, Aron, Elihu, Hyman, Mordechi, Naftula, Sholom, Tovia, Zalman.  German Klaus, Erwin, Gunter, Kurt.

variants.name: Schoenfeldt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Arno, Kurt.

nameMeanings.name: Siegfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Siegfried von Schoenfeld was born about 1270, in Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Siegfried von Schoenfeld, was 32 and his mother, Brigitta, was 24. He married Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg about 1298, in Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Siegfried von Schoenfeld est né environ 1270, à Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Siegfried von Schoenfeld, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Brigitta, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg environ 1298, à Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Siegfried von Schoenfeld um 1270 in Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Siegfried von Schoenfeld 32 und seine Mutter Brigitta 24. Er hat um 1298 in Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Siegfried von Schoenfeld è nato il circa 1270 nel Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Siegfried von Schoenfeld, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Brigitta, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg circa 1298, nel Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia.

ドイツサチセンクレイス フレイバーグナウンドルフ
ja.lifeSummary: Siegfried von Schoenfeldが約1270年にドイツサチセンクレイス フレイバーグナウンドルフで生まれた時，父Siegfried von Schoenfeldは32歳，母Brigittaは24歳であった。約1298年にドイツサチセンクレイス フレイバーグナウンドルフでMrs. Elizabeth von Schönbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Siegfried von Schoenfeld(이)가 대략 1270년 독일 작센 크레이스 프레이버그 나운도르프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Siegfried von Schoenfeld(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Brigitta(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1298년 독일 작센 크레이스 프레이버그 나운도르프에서 Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Siegfried von Schoenfeld nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Siegfried von Schoenfeld, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Brigitta, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg aproximadamente 1298, em Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Siegfried von Schoenfeld родился около 1270 г. в местности наундорф, крис фрибирг, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Siegfried von Schoenfeld было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Brigitta, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg около 1298 г. в местности наундорф, крис фрибирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Siegfried von Schoenfeld nació aproximadamente 1270, en Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Siegfried von Schoenfeld, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Brigitta, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg aproximadamente 1298, en Naundorf, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija.
